## Summary

Describe the change and the problem it solves.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Build or CI change

## Testing

Describe what you tested and how.

## Screenshots

If the UI changed, add screenshots or a short recording.

## Checklist

- [ ] I kept the scope focused
- [ ] I tested the affected flow locally when possible
- [ ] I updated documentation if needed
- [ ] I linked the related issue, if one exists
